title: hieracium kalsianum subsp. kalsianum
intro: Hieracium kalsianum subsp. kalsianum is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium kalsianum subsp. kalsianum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin problems.
